additional-references.title: Additional Reference Projects
additional-references.description: Extension of 16-reference-comparison.md. Candidates surfaced via WebSearch on 2026-04-12 across four categories:

agent-events.title: AgentEvent Union Type and Event Streaming

agents/agent-mux-remote.title: agent-mux-remote
agents/agent-mux-remote.description: Meta-adapter that invokes amux on a remote target (SSH host, Docker container, or Kubernetes pod) and bridges its event stream back to the local client. Useful for running any supported agent in an isolated or remote environment.

agents/claude.title: Claude Code
agents/claude.description: Adapter for Anthropic's Claude Code CLI.

agents/copilot.title: GitHub Copilot
agents/copilot.description: Adapter for GitHub Copilot CLI (gh copilot).

agents/cursor.title: Cursor
agents/cursor.description: Adapter for the Cursor editor's agent CLI.

agents/hermes.title: Hermes
agents/hermes.description: Adapter for Nous Research's Hermes agent CLI.

agents/omp.title: OMP
agents/omp.description: Adapter for the OMP agent CLI.

agents/opencode.title: OpenCode
agents/opencode.description: Adapter for the OpenCode multi-provider agent CLI.

agents/pi.title: Pi
agents/pi.description: Adapter for the Pi agent CLI.

README.description: These are the numbered specs — source of truth for API and behavior. Start here before reading code.

tutorials/cost-tracking.title: Cost tracking
tutorials/cost-tracking.description: agent-mux emits a cost event whenever an adapter reports usage. You can

tutorials/docker-mode.title: Docker Invocation Mode
tutorials/docker-mode.description: RunOptions.invocationMode = { kind: 'docker', ... } runs the agent inside a Docker container. The adapter builds the CLI args as usual; the invocation mode wraps them with docker run.

tutorials/getting-started.title: Getting Started
tutorials/getting-started.description: This walkthrough installs @a5c-ai/agent-mux, verifies your environment, and runs your first agent.

tutorials/hooks.title: Hooks
tutorials/hooks.description: Hooks let you observe and intercept agent activity at well-defined points without modifying the adapter.

tutorials/k8s-mode.title: Kubernetes Invocation Mode
tutorials/k8s-mode.description: RunOptions.invocationMode = { kind: 'k8s', ... } runs the agent inside a Kubernetes pod, exec'ing into a container you control.

tutorials/mock-harness.title: Mock Harness
tutorials/mock-harness.description: The mock harness replaces the real CLI spawn with a scripted event stream. Use it for tests, CI, and demos where real credentials or network access are undesirable.

tutorials/multi-agent.title: Multi-Agent Dispatch
tutorials/multi-agent.description: agent-mux lets you fan out a prompt to multiple adapters and merge the result stream. This is useful for voting, consensus, or comparison.

tutorials/plugins.title: Plugins (MCP)
tutorials/plugins.description: agent-mux normalizes plugin management across adapters that support the Model Context Protocol. Under the hood it writes to each agent's MCP config file.
